description: The color class holds a single 4 component color (R, G, B, A). Note: tdu.___ and TDU.___ can be used interchangeably. In general, TDU.___ is used to represent a class, while tdu.___ is used for the instantiator function.

members.name: r
members.description: Gets or sets the red component of the color.

members.name: g
members.description: Gets or sets the green component of the color.

members.name: b
members.description: Gets or sets the blue component of the color.

members.name: a
members.description: Gets or sets the alpha component of the color.

methods.description: Sample values may be accessed from a Color using the [] subscript operator.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Returns a new color that is a copy of the color.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Color Class wiki page
